vscode-siyuan-i18n.extension.description: Provides hover tooltips, definition jump, and reference search for SiYuan Note i18n texts.
vscode-siyuan-i18n.config.definitionLang: Language list shown when using Go to Definition (Ctrl+click). Use locale codes such as en_US, zh_CN. Leave empty to use all languages (sorted by filename).
vscode-siyuan-i18n.config.hoverLanguages: Language list and order shown on hover. Use locale codes such as en_US, zh_CN. Leave empty to use all languages (sorted by filename).
